mapper.select: SELECT id, article_title, category_id, article_cover, article_summary, article_content, article_status FROM tb_article WHERE id = #{id} AND is_delete = 0
SELECT tag_id FROM tb_article_tag_relation WHERE article_id = #{id} AND is_delete = 0
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS count FROM tb_article WHERE is_delete = 0 AND create_time >= #{startTime} GROUP BY month ORDER BY month
SELECT t.tag_name FROM tb_article_tag_relation atr JOIN tb_tag t ON atr.tag_id = t.id AND t.is_delete = 0 WHERE atr.article_id = #{id} AND atr.is_delete = 0
